ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the performance metrics are for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "w_l_percent" REAL /* Win-loss percentage */,
  "mov" REAL /* Margin of victory */,
  "ortg" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "drtg" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "nrtg" REAL /* Net rating */,
  "mov_a" REAL /* Margin of victory average */,
  "ortg_a" REAL /* Offensive rating average */,
  "drtg_a" REAL /* Defensive rating average */,
  "nrtg_a" REAL /* Net rating average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the performance metrics are for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points scored per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Home or away game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g. MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the draft pick was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract (in years) */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the performance metrics are for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "w_l_percent" REAL /* Win-loss percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_performance_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the playoff performance is for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "round_reached" TEXT /* Round reached in the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
